mapper.sql: q.id, q.name, q.image_path, q.status, q.created_by, q.activated_by, q.activated_at, q.created_at, q.updated_at, creator.display_name AS created_by_name, activator.display_name AS activated_by_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM payment_qr_config q LEFT JOIN admin_user creator ON creator.id = q.created_by LEFT JOIN admin_user activator ON activator.id = q.activated_by ORDER BY CASE WHEN q.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, q.created_at DESC, q.id DESC
SELECT FROM payment_qr_config q LEFT JOIN admin_user creator ON creator.id = q.created_by LEFT JOIN admin_user activator ON activator.id = q.activated_by WHERE q.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM payment_qr_config q LEFT JOIN admin_user creator ON creator.id = q.created_by LEFT JOIN admin_user activator ON activator.id = q.activated_by WHERE q.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY q.activated_at DESC, q.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_qr_config SET status = 'ACTIVE', activated_by = #{activatedBy}, activated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
